command: fastp --in1 REAL_TEST_1.fastq.gz --in2 REAL_TEST_2.fastq.gz --out1 REAL_TEST_1.fastp.fastq.gz --out2 REAL_TEST_2.fastp.fastq.gz --json REAL_TEST.fastp.json --html REAL_TEST.fastp.html -m --merged_out REAL_TEST.merged.fastq.gz --thread 6 --detect_adapter_for_pe --merge --overlap_len_require 10 --overlap_diff_limit 5 --overlap_diff_percent_limit 20 --correction --qualified_quality_phred 20 --cut_mean_quality 20 --cut_front --cut_tail --cut_window_size 4 --detect_adapter_for_pe --length_required 50 --n_base_limit 5
